name: 30 Minute Chili
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Ground chuck or lean ground beef
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meat in a little butter over medium heat and cook until the meat is brown, about 10 minutes.
2. Add all other ingredients except hot sauce to the pot.
3. Stir well to combine.
4. Bring the mixture to a simmer and let it cook for 30 minutes.
5. Taste and adjust seasoning with hot sauce as desired.
